timeout.message: Timed out running command: `{command}`, after: {timeout} seconds

reserved_reload_name.description: The shell command name {name} is a reserved for the reload action and cannot be used for user-defined commands. Please rename or remove this entry from your configuration.
reserved_reload_name.title: Reserved shell command action name
